goal: Add a card-spread selector to the embeddable widget: choose a spread -> draw -> cards show (founder request)
done: Extended widget.html (+/th/) from single-card-only to a spread picker. Two chips: 'Single Card' (1) and 'Past · Present · Future' (3). Selecting a chip shows that many face-down backs (with position labels for the 3-card); Draw flips to faces. Each drawn card is now an <a> linking to its /cards/<slug>/ page (UTM card); single-card keeps the keyword line + 'Read full meaning ->' to that card; 3-card shows a 'Get your full reading ->' CTA to /question.html (UTM spread). pick() Fisher-Yates guarantees distinct cards. Optional ?spread=three default for embedders. No new deps; 78-card data array untouched; layout fits the 340x600 embed iframe.
verified: Headless Chrome (file://): 0 JS errors; single=1 card+keys+Read-full-meaning; three=3 distinct cards (Past/Present/Future labels, per-card /cards/<slug>/ links, Get-your-full-reading->/question.html); EN + TH (?lang=th -> /th/ base, Thai chips/labels); ?spread=three default honored; screenshotted both at 340x600.
